rulings.Case Title: EDWARD SHORTALL VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Amendment To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 17, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 3. Defendant Nibco Inc.¿s motion to strike portions of plaintiff¿s first amended complaint is granted. Plaintiff did not file a substantive opposition. Plaintiff is not precluded from bringing a proper motion for leave to amend to add defendant. The hearing on this motion will be at 9:30am in Dept. 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. = (220/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: HAROLD GERECKE et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION, LTD et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 17, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 4. Defendant John Crane, Inc.¿s demurrer to plaintiffs¿ second amended complaint is sustained in part and overruled in part. It is sustained with 10 days leave to amend to give plaintiffs the opportunity, if they are able to do so, to plead facts sufficient to meet the requirements of Bockrath v. Aldrich Chemical Co., Inc, 21 Ca.4th 71 (1999). It is overruled as to the asbestos-related illness issue. Plaintiffs¿ complaint contains sufficient allegations that Mr. Gerecke died from an asbestos-related illness. The hearing on this demurrer will take place at 9:30am in Dept. 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. = (220/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: HAROLD GERECKE et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION, LTD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Order Granting Leave To File Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 17, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 4. Plaintiffs¿ motion for order granting leave to file third amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. The hearing on this motion will take place at 9:30am in Dept. 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. = (220/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: ALBERT LAWRENCE LEVENE VS. BONDEX INTERNATIONAL, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Ordering Allowing Andrew Mcenaney Leave To Appear As Counsel Pro Hac Vice
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 17, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to allow Andrew McEnaney to appear as counsel pro hac vice is granted. Plaintiffs¿ application meets the requirements of CRC 9.40 and the court finds no reason to use its discretion to deny the motion. The hearing on this motion will take place at 9:30am in Dept. 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. = (220/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH R. JANSSENS VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 17, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 2. Defendant The Goodyear Tire and Rubber Co.¿s motion for summary judgment is off calendar pursuant to the notice of the death of Mr. Janssens filed by plaintiff on July 29. = (220/TLJ)
